column1: # selected wake-word model id (so a server-side `wake_word_model` setting
# change is picked up on the next boot
# `model` holds the esp-sr WakeNet image (srmodels.bin). esp-sr's build hook
# auto-flashes it as part of `idf.py flash` whenever a `model` partition is
# is overkill for a single wn9 model (~600 KB) but leaves headroom for adding
# MultiNet command-word or a second wake-word later.
# 8 MB flash layout: 64 KB pre-app + 3 MB factory + 512 KB storage + 3 MB
# model + ~1.4 MB free for future OTA.
